quotes.text: Indie hackers: 'I want to build something that makes $10k MRR.' Reality: you build something that makes $100 MRR and you're thrilled.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you build exactly what the customer asked for, they'll complain it doesn't work the way they actually need it to.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first year in business is survival. Your second year is learning. Your third year is growth.
